versions.version_description: This one plays the baseline walkdown (D-C-B-Bb) and sounds closer to the original. The other ones want standard open chords when they don't fit very well.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm sorry if I seem uninterested[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
No I'm not listening[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
No I'm indifferent[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Truly, I ain't got no business here[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
But since my friends are here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I just came to kick it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
But really I would rather be at home all by myself[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch] 
Not in this room with people who don't even care about my well being[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
I don't dance, Don't ask, I don't need a boyfriend[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
So you can go back, please enjoy your party[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'll be here[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
Somewhere in the corner[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Under clouds marijuana with this boy who's hollerin'[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can hardly hear[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Oh with this music I don't listen to[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I don't want to get with you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
So tell my friends that I'll be over here[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh oh oh I ask myself what am I doing here[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
And I can't wait 'til we can break up out[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Excuse me if I seem a little unimpressed with this[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
An anti-social pessimist, but usually I don't mess with this[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
And I know you mean only the best[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
And your intentions aren't to bother me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
But honestly I'd rather be somewhere with my people[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
We can kick it and just listen to some music with a message[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Like we usually do[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
And we'll discuss our big dreams[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
How we plan to take over the planet[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]
So pardon my manners[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
I hope you'll understand that I'll be here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Not there in the kitchen with the girl who's always[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
gossiping about her friends[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh tell them I'll be here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Right next to the boy who's throwing up[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
Cause he can't take what's in his cup no more[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh god why am I here[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh oh oh I ask myself what am I doing here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
And I can't wait 'till we can break up out[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
The Hours later, congregatin' next to the refrigerator[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
Some girl's talking about her haters, she ain't got none[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
How did it ever come to this[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
I should've never come to this[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
So holla at me, I'll be in the car when you're done[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm stand-offish[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Don't want what you're offerin' and I'm done talking[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Awfully sad it had to be that way[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
So tell my people when they ready[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
That I'm standing by the t.v. with my beanie low[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
Yo I'll be over here[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh oh oh I ask myself what am I doing here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can't wait 'till we can break up out of here[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
If you're ready then I'm ready yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
If you're ready then I'm ready yeah[/tab]
